name: zone
description: Configuration keywords for 'plot item create zone'. Top-level keywords are binary-validated against FLAC2D 9.0.

basic_keywords.description: Show or hide the zone item without removing it.
Apply a single flat color to all zones (no field mapping).
Color zones by a scalar/vector/tensor field attribute. See sub-item 'contour'.
Label / categorical color zones by group, state, model, property, etc. See sub-item 'label'.
Show a legend with sub-keywords (active, count, deformation-factor, heading, hide-null, label, map, title).
Apply a 2D cut to the zone visualization (FLAC2D).
Filter which zones are drawn using range elements (see references/range-elements).
Exaggerate displacement when drawing zone deformation.
Show zone ID numbers on each zone.

sub_items.name: contour
sub_items.description: Color zones continuously by a scalar/vector/tensor attribute (displacement, stress-*, pore-pressure, etc.).

sub_items.name: label
sub_items.description: Label / categorical color zones by group, state, model, property, density, extra, etc.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create zone label group legend active on
plot item create zone contour displacement legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Continuous displacement color map (interpolated from gridpoints).

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create zone contour stress-xx legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Useful for stress concentration / equilibrium checks.

common_usage_patterns.use_case: Zones colored by constitutive model state
common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create zone label state any legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Highlight plastic / elastic / yielded zones by model state codes. 'label state' requires 'any' or 'average' before further options.
Uniform color (e.g. background context behind a vector overlay).

notes: Probe live with 'plot item create zone ?' to list top-level keywords, then 'plot item create zone <kw> ?' for sub-options.
'contour' is the FLAC mechanism for color-by-field-value; 'label' is the mechanism for categorical coloring (group/state/model).
Tokens like 'color-by', 'color-options' from other Itasca-style tools are NOT accepted by zone items in FLAC2D 9.0.
flac3d_notes: FLAC3D 9.0 zone item ALSO accepts 'transparency <0-100>', 'clip ...', and a 3D 'cut' (plane) keyword in addition to the keywords listed in basic_keywords. These are FLAC3D-only and are rejected by FLAC2D 9.0.
FLAC3D 'cut' uses a 3D plane: 'cut active on type plane origin (x,y,z) normal (nx,ny,nz) [surface on|off] [front on|off] [back on|off]'. FLAC2D uses 'cut-line width <int>' for 2D cutting.
FLAC2D-only keywords NOT accepted by FLAC3D: 'color' (flat color), 'show-zone-id', 'text', 'zone-id-max', 'zone-id-min'.
